message:
test(trauma): add comprehensive unit tests for trauma.ts module

Add 41 tests covering all exported functions from the trauma.ts safety
module (Project Hot Stove):

- DOOM_PATTERNS: Validate pattern matching for dangerous commands
  (rm -rf, DROP DATABASE, git force push, terraform destroy, etc.)
- loadTraumas(): Loading from JSONL files, edge cases (corrupt/empty)
- saveTrauma(): Atomic persistence with file locking
- findMatchingTrauma(): Pattern matching against commands
- scanForTraumas(): Cass history scanning with CassRunner injection
- setTraumaStatusById/healTraumaById: Status updates
- removeTraumaById: Trauma removal

Tests use proper isolation (withTempCassHome, withTempDir) and NO mocks
per project testing philosophy. All 41 tests pass.

Closes cass_memory_system-6xl2
